behavior_in_task_description.reason: All paths (flag.ts, registry.ts, README.md, translator.md), the env var name OPENCODE_ENABLE_QUESTION_TOOL, and the command string are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to add/change behaviorally without showing exact code replacements or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (flag exists, question tool gating logic) and doc strings; alternative implementations passing the same semantics would work.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute bun scripts, run typecheck, and run unit tests; only the docs tests are text-based.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests verify actual gating behavior with/without env var and require real flag implementation.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Flag definition, ACP gating, default behavior for other clients, README docs, and translator.md glossary are all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section with comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Config/documentation).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and variable names consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files at module level, which is reasonable given the task scope, without pinpointing exact lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: translator.md and README.md edits are small localized additions, not full rewrites.
